name: Fancy Wood Industries Public Company Limited
summary: Fancy Wood Industries Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells wood furniture and rubber wood products in Thailand and internationally. The company offers particle board, modified rubber wood, and services related to rubber wood. It is also involved in real estate development activities, as well as rental of property. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Samutprakarn, Thailand.
